components.headline: Scale Careerflow.ai's AI-Powered Education Platform
components.subtext: ABM-powered growth for Careerflow.ai's education-focused career platform.
components.proof: Trusted by education institutions and edtech teams worldwide.
components.trust-heading: Trusted by education marketing and student success teams.
components.feature-1-desc: Unified dashboards surface institutional signals, student engagement, and enrollment changes in real time.
components.feature-2-desc: AI-powered playbooks detect underperforming campaigns, triage issues, and optimize spend in real time. Cut time-to-adjust by up to 80%.
components.feature-3-desc: Design and deploy ABM programs for colleges and universities with a visual editor. Connect 200+ marketing tools without boilerplate.
components.testimonial-quote: "This platform transformed our education ABM program, accelerating enrollment and boosting student engagement."
components.testimonial-author: Sophie Kim, VP of Marketing at Leading Education Partners
components.cta-headline: Ready to transform Careerflow.ai's education ABM program?
